basic_details.job_title: JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 51 Sangini (AWW) / Sahayika (AWH) Posts
basic_details.short_information: Jammu and Kashmir Anganwadi (JK Anganwadi) Sangini (AWW) / Sahayika (AWH) Notification 2026 has been released on 29 June 2026 on the official website of JK Anganwadi. A total of 51 vacancies have been announced through the JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: 10+2 pass for Sangini (AWW), Matriculation for Sahayika (AWH)
qualification.details: Sangini (AWW): 10+2 pass (maximum graduation) Sahayika (AWH): Matriculation (minimum 8th standard if no matriculate available)

selection_process: Merit based on marks in 10+2 for AWW Merit and need-based for AWH
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JK Anganwadi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.jammu_and_kashmir_anganwadi: 10+2 pass for Sangini (AWW), Matriculation for Sahayika (AWH)

content_sections.heading: JK Anganwadi Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the JK Anganwadi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download JK Anganwadi Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Sangini (AWW): 10+2 pass (maximum graduation) Sahayika (AWH): Matriculation (minimum 8th standard if no matriculate available)

content_sections.heading: JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

content_sections.heading: JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Merit based on marks in 10+2 for AWW Merit and need-based for AWH

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for JK Anganwadi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JK Anganwadi recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the JK Anganwadi recruitment is 13th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Sangini (AWW) and Sahayika (AWH) posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 51 vacancies. Out of these, 2 vacancies are for Sangini (AWW) and 48 vacancies are for Sahayika (AWH) posts.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: For Sangini (AWW) posts, candidates must have passed 10+2. For Sahayika (AWH) posts, Matriculation is required, with a provision for candidates who have passed at least 8th standard if no matriculate candidates are available.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these positions?
faq.answer: The age limit for all posts is between a minimum of 18 years and a maximum of 37 years. Specific age relaxations are not detailed in the provided information.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for JK Anganwadi recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for Sangini (AWW) posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for Sangini (AWW) posts is merit-based, determined by the marks obtained in the 10+2 examinations.

faq.question: Q8. How are candidates selected for Sahayika (AWH) posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for Sahayika (AWH) posts is based on a combination of merit and need-based assessment, as per the official guidelines.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these Anganwadi positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Sangini (AWW) and Sahayika (AWH) are contractual in nature, as indicated in the recruitment details.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can typically be found on the official website of Jammu and Kashmir Anganwadi or through the direct links provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.

faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the JK Anganwadi recruitment is 13th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this date.
